title: Distributed Task Queue
description: A high-throughput, fault-tolerant job queue built on top of Redis Streams. Supports priorities, retries with exponential backoff, dead-letter queues, and real-time monitoring dashboard.

title: OpenAPI Schema Validator
description: CLI and library for validating OpenAPI 3.x specs against real HTTP traffic. Catches breaking changes before they reach production. Integrates with CI/CD pipelines.

title: Edge Config SDK
description: Ultra-fast read-only key-value store for edge environments. Sub-millisecond reads, global replication, and zero cold starts. Compatible with Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge, and Deno Deploy.

title: Telemetry Pipeline
description: Streaming observability pipeline that collects, transforms, and routes logs, metrics, and traces from heterogeneous sources. Built with a plugin-based processor architecture.
impact: Replaced a $300k/year vendor tool, saving 80% cost

title: Remix Auth Starter
description: Production-ready authentication boilerplate for Remix applications. Includes email/password, OAuth (GitHub, Google), magic links, RBAC, and session management.
